children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the full 'place' order workflow: validate items, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order record, send notification.
children.behavior: Receives command and order_data; if command is 'place', performs all steps sequentially; returns success/failure result with rollback on failure.
children.signature: def PlaceOrder(command: str, order_data: dict) -> dict

global_vars.description: Create new order record and update status
Reserve items and decrement stock on confirmation
Create payment record and charge payment

data_operations.description: Read stock, reserve items, decrement on success

constraints.description: Must rollback all changes if any step fails

acceptance_criteria.description: Order created with status 'confirmed' on success

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the full 'cancel' order workflow: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update order status.
children.behavior: Receives command and order_data; if command is 'cancel', performs all steps sequentially; returns success/failure result with rollback on failure.
children.signature: def CancelOrder(command: str, order_data: dict) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read order status, update to cancelled
Restore reserved items to available stock

data_operations.description: Read order, update status to cancelled
Restore inventory from reserved to available

constraints.description: Must verify order is not shipped before cancelling

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'track' order workflow: return current order status and estimated delivery time.
children.behavior: Receives command and order_data; if command is 'track', queries order status and estimated delivery; returns result.
children.signature: def TrackOrder(command: str, order_data: dict) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read product details for delivery estimation

data_operations.description: Read product details for delivery estimation

governance_notes: Parent global vars conservation verified: orders (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (read_write) and CancelOrder (read_write); inventory (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (read_write) and CancelOrder (read_write); payments (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (read_write) and CancelOrder (read_write). TrackOrder uses read-only access which is a subset of read_write and does not violate conservation since the parent's read_write requirement is satisfied by the other two children.
